data.title: Update project docs to reflect EAGAIN retry and resource_exhaustion status
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new EAGAIN retry behavior and resource_exhaustion status value
**Why**: Future agents and developers need accurate awareness of the new test-gate-status value and retry behavior to avoid confusion when they see resource_exhaustion in output
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section (test gate description), update KNOWN-ISSUES.md if EAGAIN workarounds are documented there
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the resource_exhaustion status value and EAGAIN retry behavior in the test gate section
  ← Satisfies: "Resource exhaustion events are visible in test-gate-status output as a distinct resource_exhaustion status value"
